paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.05, with a 2.02 percent increase from the prior close, and a 36.32 percent decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. The price quote is as of July 17, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with a recent headline from Stocktwits discussing Fermi's lack of revenue and significant loss, while also mentioning the company's expectations to sign binding agreements with tenants over the next year.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including three 8-K forms and two other forms, with the most recent 8-K form filed on July 15, 2026, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
